Business Development & Data Analysis · Cairo, Egypt

Translating complex
solutions into deals
that close.

I'm Nourhan Dawoud — a Senior Business Development professional with 4+ years turning technical and regulatory complexity into business value that decision‑makers understand. I run the full sales cycle end to end, from market research and lead qualification through proposal, negotiation, and signature — across B2B and government‑driven projects — and I increasingly back that judgment with my own data analysis and dashboards.

01 · Career Pipeline

Five stages, one funnel.

From first‑line customer service to senior business development — each role narrowed toward strategic, enterprise‑level deal‑making. Open a stage for the detail.

Moderator
Customer Service
Account Manager
BD Specialist
Senior BD
  • Led the development and management of a B2B and B2G sales pipeline, identifying high‑value opportunities and supporting sustainable revenue growth across enterprise and government sectors.
  • Conducted strategic business meetings with prospective and existing clients to assess business needs, regulatory requirements, and digital transformation objectives — delivering tailored e‑signature and information‑security solutions.
  • Owned the end‑to‑end sales cycle — lead qualification, solution positioning, proposal preparation, negotiation, and contract closure — closing more than 4 strategic cooperation agreements with enterprise and government partners.
  • Coordinated testing and implementation phases for signed contracts alongside technical teams, ensuring solution validation and readiness before go‑live.
  • Collaborated cross‑functionally (technical, legal, operations, finance, compliance) to structure cooperation models and align contractual requirements.
  • Monitored pipeline performance, contract progress, and client feedback to inform management decision‑making.
  • Identified and qualified new leads through online platforms, industry events, and referrals — assessing fit by relevance, interest, and buying intent.
  • Built and maintained relationships with decision‑makers at conferences and through regular client engagement focused on needs and satisfaction.
  • Created tailored proposals and negotiated terms, pricing, and contract details to close deals.
  • Monitored industry trends, competitors, and customer behaviour to inform market positioning.
  • Prepared accurate sales offers detailing pricing, deliverables, and terms, highlighting client value.
  • Coordinated internally with marketing, product, and finance teams, prioritising VIP client needs.
  • Managed and strengthened relationships with 23 key accounts — including 8 banks, 10 insurance companies, and 5 government entities — through tailored account management.
  • Acted as primary point of contact for partner and account communications, providing consultative support and timely resolutions.
  • Collaborated with sales, marketing, technical, and support teams to deliver partner requirements and execute account initiatives.
  • Analysed account performance data and client feedback to identify growth opportunities and optimise strategy.
  • Maintained accurate records of sales activity, contracts, and account interactions for data integrity and tracking.
  • Oversaw contract management and renewals, proactively addressing issues and supporting negotiations.
  • Processed orders, returns, cancellations, and exchanges with accuracy and attention to detail.
  • Troubleshot technical issues, offered ongoing support, and collaborated with product teams on user experience.
  • Maintained accurate records of customer interactions and followed up to ensure resolution and service quality.
  • Generated and converted sales leads, engaging in upselling when appropriate.
  • Delivered prompt, empathetic service representing the company's values.
  • Responded to user inquiries with accurate information and assistance.
  • Managed user behaviour to ensure compliance with community standards.
  • Monitored interactions to pre‑emptively address potential issues.
  • Facilitated engagement by encouraging participation and dialogue.
  • Tracked industry trends to keep the community informed.

03 · Closed Deals — Data Portfolio

Dashboards built to drive the decision.

Three interactive dashboards built to turn raw business data into the kind of insight that moves a deal — or a decision — forward.

Revenue, Trend & Top Accounts

Sales & Revenue Performance Dashboard

Interactive dashboard tracking total revenue, quantity sold, and orders against returns — broken down by category, segment, ship mode, and region, with a year-over-year revenue trend and a top‑5 customer ranking.

  • Revenue vs. returns tracked across category, segment, ship mode, and region
  • Year‑over‑year revenue trend from $0.19M to $0.34M
  • Monthly revenue/profit breakdown and top 5 customers by value
Power BI · 4‑Page Report

Commercial Performance Overview

A four‑page Power BI report spanning revenue, customer demographics, market trends, and promotion effectiveness — built so each function can self‑serve the cut of the data it needs.

  • $139.09K total revenue across 120 customers, 52% profit margin
  • Customer segmentation by age, gender, city, and loyalty status
  • Promotion‑level ROI: discount cost vs. growth revenue by campaign
People Analytics

HR Attrition Report

Interactive HR dashboard analyzing employee attrition drivers — filterable by job role, age, marital status, and department — to flag where retention risk is concentrated.

  • 17.5% overall attrition rate, segmented by department and role
  • Attrition correlated against business travel and marital status
  • Salary and gender mix benchmarked against attrition rate
